title: Silver Large Number 1 Balloon: 40 Inch Big Foil Number for Kids Boy Girl 1st Birthday Party Baby Shower Anniversary Decorations - Giant Helium Mylar Age 0-9
features: LARGE SIZED - Each pack comes with 1pc 40inch silver 1 balloon number and 1 straw, these number balloons in classic color set can make your party more eye-catching and make your party more unique
PREMIUM Material - Our silver number balloons are made of high-quality aluminum foil, shiny, strong and durable, not easy to break and not easy to leak

EASY TO USE - This silver 1 foil balloon number has a self-sealing glue inside the inflation hole, before inflating, you can use the straw came with the package to open the hole, it can be completely sealed by pinching after filling the balloon

WIDE APPLICATIONS - These silver foil helium balloons are brightly colored, perfect for boys and girls birthday parties, baby showers, weddings, anniversaries and other party decorations, you can choose to combine 0-9 numbers for different applications
AFTER-SALES SERVICE - We are committed to providing the best service. If you have any problems during use, please contact us by email, we will try our best to address your issue
description: Product Description AULE Balloon Number - The package of 1 number balloon is perfect for birthdays or anniversaries. - These balloons can be inflated with air, helium and water. The inflated condition of the balloon can be kept for at least 2 days. Why Choose Us: High-quality and safe party decorations. AULE Balloon has been trusted by thousands of satisfied customers. To make a special day for every beautiful occasion is our mission. The customer experience is our highest priority We have ten years of experience in designing decoration products and are committed to creating the most suitable decorative items for your parties, birthdays and events. Specification Material: Polyester Film + Aluminium Foil Model: Number balloon Colors: Available in 5 colours Gold / Silver / Rose Gold / Black / Red Size: 101 cm / 40 inches Package Included 1 x Number Balloon 1 x Straw Product Presentation You can freely combine our products as you like. 100 Pieces - Gold 100 Pieces - Rose Gold 100 Pieces - Blue 100 Pieces - Silver 100 Pieces - Lime Green 100 Pieces - Fuchsia Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,040 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,040 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,040 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,040 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,040 4.3 out of 5 stars 2,040 Price — no data £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 Size 13/25/30/46 cm 13/25/30/46 cm 13/25/30/46 cm 13/25/30/46 cm 13/25/30/46 cm 13/25/30/46 cm Quantity 100 Pcs 100 Pcs 100 Pcs 100 Pcs 100 Pcs 100 Pcs 42 Pieces - Silver 42 Pieces - Gold 42 Pieces - Purple 42 Pieces - Rose Gold 42 Pieces - Fuchsia 42 Pieces - Red Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,447 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,447 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,447 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,447 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,447 4.4 out of 5 stars 5,447 Price £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 Size 30 cm 30 cm 30 cm 30 cm 30 cm 30 cm Quantity 42 Pcs 42 Pcs 42 Pcs 42 Pcs 42 Pcs 42 Pcs
